title: Maxema - Flow Pure - Personalized and promotional pens. Promotional writing instruments and custom printed pens.
description: Flow Pure Flow Pure is the outcome of our stylistic journey in pursuit of the essence of design. This model stands out for purity of line, compact volumes and discreetly elegant detailing. At once delicate and aggressive, Flow Pure presents with all-over rubber finish on barrel and cap and is available in a palette of colours enriched by fluo shades and original colour combinations, where black is the new ‘in’ colour.

headings.text: Satin finish and elegant: this is the new matt finish on barrel, cap and clip
Rubberised all over: soft touch barrel and cap
Available in fluo colours, intense and vibrant shades
